data.stimulus:
In the following task, you need to look at words or images that appear in the middle of the screen.

You will also see category words at the corners, such as GOOD and BAD.
Use e and i keys to match the category.

Press space bar to see example.
data.subject: hq879g22khw9971

data.stimulus:
For example, this is an image of a girl. Because "girl" is on the left side of the screen, you press the e key.

For example, the word "grief" is a BAD word, and because "BAD" is on the left side of the screen, you press the i key.

Press space bar to continue.
data.subject: hq879g22khw9971

data.stimulus:
Sometimes, you even get four categories on screen. You need find the category is belongs to. GOOD and BAD are in capitals, and girl and boy are in small letters.

Here you should press e key, because it is an image of a girl.

If you press the wrong key, a red X will appear. To continue, you need to press the correct key to continue. For example, if you press i after you see this image of a girl, a red cross will appear. You will need to press e to be able to see the next trial, as this is a picture of a girl and "girl" is on the left side of the screen.

Press space bar to continue.
data.subject: hq879g22khw9971
